paracetamol.name: Paracetamol
paracetamol.use: Fever aur mild pain ke liye commonly use hoti hai.
paracetamol.precaution: Liver problem wale patients doctor se advice lein.

ibuprofen.name: Ibuprofen
ibuprofen.use: Pain aur inflammation me use hoti hai.
ibuprofen.precaution: Stomach ulcer, kidney problem ya blood thinner lene wale doctor se consult karein.

cetirizine.name: Cetirizine
cetirizine.use: Allergy symptoms jaise sneezing, itching me help kar sakti hai.
cetirizine.precaution: Neend aa sakti hai, driving me caution rakhein.

omeprazole.name: Omeprazole
omeprazole.use: Acidity aur stomach acid related problems me use hoti hai.
omeprazole.precaution: Long term use doctor advice se karein.
